title: Sequence indexes must have an index method
description: This rule checks if sequence indexes are accessed without an index method, which can lead to slow performance.
message: Sequence indexes should have an index method.
recommendation: Use list.index() or any other index accessing method.

noncompliant.description: Accessing a sequence index without an index method

compliant.description: Accessing a sequence index with an index method

why_is_this_an_issue: Accessing sequence indices without an index method can lead to slow performance.
how_to_fix: Use list.index() or any other index accessing method.

metadata.title: Sequence indexes must have an index method
